nasb.text: Now the sons of Israel again did evil in the sight of the Lord, so that the Lord gave them into the hands of the Philistines forty years.

esv.text: And the people of Israel again did what was evil in the sight of the Lord, so the Lord gave them into the hand of the Philistines for forty years.

cnv.text: 以色列人又行了耶和華看為惡的事，耶和華就把他們交在非利士人手中四十年。

ccb.text: 以色列人又做耶和华视为恶的事，耶和华就把他们交在非利士人手中四十年。
